items.raw_excerpt: Modern LLM agents increasingly rely on context compaction, summarization, or eviction to keep long-running sessions within a token budget. items.raw_excerpt: Neural networks are a commonly used prediction tool in computer science and statistics. In this letter, we demystify neural networks by describing networks that approximate a linear regression and describe common customizations that provide a foundation for further study.
